magicWorks.title: How the Magic Works
magicWorks.subtitle: Create a lifelong memory in just 3 simple steps. It takes less than 2 minutes!

step1.title: 1. Choose a Story
step1.description: Select from our library of magical adventures, from space exploration to dinosaur quests.

step2.title: 2. Upload a Photo
step2.description: Upload a clear photo of your child and enter their name. Our AI handles the rest securely.

step3.title: 3. See the Magic
step3.description: Preview the book instantly! We print on high-quality paper and ship it directly to you.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need WhatsApp Business API?
faq.a1: Yes. Wapilot integrates directly with the official WhatsApp Business API. This is crucial for automation, scaling, and ensuring compliance with Meta's policies.
faq.a2: No. Wapilot follows WhatsApp’s official messaging guidelines and built-in rate limits. As long as users opt in to receive messages, your number remains safe and compliant.
faq.a3: Yes. You can connect multiple WhatsApp numbers and allow multiple team members to manage conversations from a shared dashboard.
